metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_987
metadata.comment:
Rationale: AKAP150 Is Present in the PSD and at Synaptic Sites in Cultured Hippocampal Neurons (Figure 1).

28/6/2017 Pim
- See more detailed feedback and breakdown of this paper in ticket #396. Experimental description: Cultured rat neonatal hippocampal neurons were grown on coverslips
PSD fractions were prepared from frozen rat brains
For immunoprecipitation extracts of rat forebrain crude synaptosomes were prepared

"Construction of His-tagged AKAP79 in the pET16 vector and AKAP79:GFP and AKAP79-Pro:GFP in the pEGFPN1 vector (Clon- tech) has been described (Gao et al., 1997; Dell'Acqua et al., 1998)."

10/4/2017 Pim
- The synaptic localization of rat AKAP120 in the PSD fraction suggest that the rat protein is localized in the PSD. This is strengthened by showing that the mouse proptein can interact with all kinds of postsynaptic proteins. But the primary relevant data on localization is made on the rat protein.
